title: "Making millions of dollars posting absolute lies": Candace Owens' net worth draws attention after Laura Loomer demands demonetization over Charlie Kirk claims
summary_full: Laura Loomer has called for Candace Owens to be demonetized, accusing her of profiting from content about Charlie Kirk's death and allegedly harassing his family. Owens rejected the criticism and hit back at Loomer on X. The dispute comes amid Owens' ongoing public feud with Ben Shapiro and Andrew Kolvet, who have also criticized her commentary surrounding Kirk's death and the claims she has continued to promote.
summary_public: Laura Loomer has called for Candace Owens to be demonetized, accusing her of profiting from content about Charlie Kirk's death and allegedly harassing his family. Owens rejected the criticism and hit back at Loomer on X.…
